tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I sent a signal through the static
But you were already gone
Holding on to something fragile
Breaking before the dawn

[Pre-Chorus]
Every whisper turns to white noise
Every shadow knows your name

[Chorus]
Fading signal in the dark
Can you hear me falling apart
I was your frequency
Now I'm just the silence
Fading signal in the dark

[Verse 2]
Your voice still echoes through the wires
A ghost inside my phone
I keep replaying our disaster
Drowning in monotone

[Pre-Chorus]
Every whisper turns to white noise
Every shadow knows your name

[Chorus]
Fading signal in the dark
Can you hear me falling apart
I was your frequency
Now I'm just the silence
Fading signal in the dark

[Bridge]
Static hearts and broken codes
We were never on the same wavelength

[Outro]
Fading signal... fading signal...
Can you hear me now

tracks.title: 🇵🇪 Wind of the Andes | Wayra — Música Andina del Perú | Assirem Music PROD
tracks.description:
Wayra — el viento sagrado de los Andes 🏔️

Un viaje sonoro por las montañas del Perú, desde las ruinas de Machu Picchu hasta las orillas del Lago Titicaca.

Wayra means "wind" in Quechua. This piece channels the ancient spirit of the Andes through traditional instruments: charango, zampoña panpipes, and quena flute.

🎵 Inspired by Peruvian folk traditions and UNESCO Intangible Heritage.

⏱️ Chapters:
00:00 — Amanecer en los Andes
01:00 — Charango Melody
02:30 — Zampoña Solo
03:30 — Huayno Rhythm
04:30 — Wayra Final
